opinion.h4: MONTIETH v. OREGON. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OREGON. No. 1459, Misc. Decided May 8, 1967.
opinion.p: 246 Ore. -, 417 P.2d 1012, appeal dismissed and certiorari denied.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
